title: Automate project intake with multi-agent AI using MCP, Google ADK, Cloud Run, and BigQuery
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents a multi-agent AI system that automates project intake by connecting Asana, Vertex AI agents, and BigQuery using the Model Context Protocol and Agent Development Kit. The system runs on Cloud Run, assigns risk scores and recommendations to project proposals, and executes specialist agents in parallel using the Agent-to-Agent protocol.
